title: Larry May
compiled_truth: Larry May is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-04-06 to 2002-05-22), Larry May sent 117 and received 492 emails, totalling 609 interactions. Top correspondents: [John Arnold](people/john-arnold) (14), [John Griffith](people/john-griffith) (10), [Jeffrey Gossett](people/jeffrey-gossett) (9), [Mike Maggi](people/mike-maggi) (8), [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (7). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, _sent_mail, deleted_items, sent, sent_items.
